blocks.text: Figma task UI state is upstream context, not a provider runtime interpretation surface.

items: Task thread selection, annotation parsing, dropdowns, and participant projection are control-plane/client concerns.
The runtime consumes only structured assignment input and command signals such as cancel or interrupt.
Telemetry markers may pass through as metadata, but they must not change execution authority.

blocks.text: A provider adapter must never infer target policy or workspace authority from UI-only labels.
